definition:
1. a loosing one from another, separating, parting , τῆς ψυχῆς καὶ τοῦ σώματος (Plato Philosophus); δ. τοῦ σώματος its dissolution , (Plato Philosophus); ἡ δ. τῆς γεφύρας the breaking  down the bridge, (Thucydides): the disbanding , of troops, Xen.;  ἡ δ. τῆς ἀγορᾶς the time of  its breaking up , Hdt.;  τὴν δ. ἐποιήσαντο broke off  the action, Thuc.;  δ. γάμου a divorce , (Plutarch) 
2. an ending, cessation , κακῶν Eur.;  πολέμου (Thucydides): absolute a cessation of hostilities, peace , (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
